user.title: De Lijn — API Configuration
user.description: Enter your De Lijn Open Data API key.

add_stop.title: Search for a stop
add_stop.description: Search by **name** to get all platforms grouped together, or by **stop number** (printed on the stop sign) to monitor a single specific platform.

select_stop.title: Select a stop
select_stop.description: Select a stop, or choose **← Search again** to refine your search.

confirm_stops.title: Configured stops
confirm_stops.description:
The following stops will be monitored:
{stops}

error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API key or API unreachable.
error.no_stops_found: No stops found matching your search.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the De Lijn API.

add_stop.title: Add a stop
add_stop.description: Search by name or stop number.

select_stop.title: Select a stop
select_stop.description: Select a stop, or choose **← Search again** to refine your search.

force_cache_refresh.title: Force stop data refresh
force_cache_refresh.description: This will re-download all De Lijn stop data. Continue?

error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API key or API unreachable.
error.no_stops_found: No stops found matching your search.
